author: lOrm
content:
Deferred — owner-level architectural refactor; blocked behind #449 (the agentic-loop extraction).

**Fix outline:** Extract self.build_agent_task(session_messages) -> AgentTask which owns the 11 cloned fields (client, endpoint, headers, provider, model, effort_level, claude_code_token, prompt_blocks, hook_engine, memory_db, session_messages) + the mpsc tx. On AgentTask: pub async fn run(self) that delegates to the shared agentic loop from #449. src/tui/app.rs:1335-1543 spawn_api_turn collapses to: let task = self.build_agent_task(messages); handle.spawn(async move { task.run().await });. Removes the 200-line move-closure and the pyramid-of-doom error nesting.

**Dependency:** Cannot land cleanly until #449 (extract run_agentic_loop) is done. Defer with #449.
